text: アークスシップの炎渦

アークスシップの市街地で火災が発生し
逃げ遅れた市民へ被害が広がっている。
アークス各員は救助活動の準備を整えた後
火災を消し止め、人命の救助に向かえ。
ある特殊な潜在能力を持つ武器があれば、
効率よく救助が行えるようだが……
――――――――――――――――――――
クエストポイント【119】達成でクリア

Swirling Inferno on the ARKS Ship

A fire has erupted in the City Area of the
ARKS Ship, injuring citizens who were unable to
evac in time. All ARKS personnel are to prepare for
our rescue efforts, stop the fire, and rescue
those affected. It seems that certain weapons with
latent abilities work most efficiently for rescues.
--------------------------------------------------------
Complete by obtaining 119 Quest Points.
Collect points by rescuing those requiring assistance.
You will fail this quest if your exceed the time limit.
